source_note: Quarterly P&L rollups are sourced from the canonical Finance Excel (NA_Integrated_Marketing_FY26_PnL.xlsx, maintained by Marketing Finance) and reconciled monthly against Jira ticket attachments + vendor invoices. The dashboard reads a snapshot; it does not authorize spend or replace the system of record.

quarters.headline: Closed -4.8% under plan. Mad Ellie SP1 launch landed late in the quarter (Mar 26) so most BL4 spend pushed into Q2; Civ VII Apple Arcade light marketing layer + Mafia Free Ride goodwill update drove softer-than-planned Q1 actuals.

titles.notes: Apple Arcade launch Feb 5 (Behaviour x Firaxis) + Test of Time pre-launch planning. Apple co-marketing absorbed most awareness lift.
Mad Ellie SP1 launch week paid landed Mar 26 — ~$230K landed in Q1 even though most SP1 budget books Q2. Heaven Phase 1 came in +12% over plan.
Q2 sustain push started Apr 1 — Q1 was Free Ride goodwill update + evergreen only. Light by design.
Pre-reveal hygiene only. Harbor MSA still in Legal redline; quest config not yet billable.
Evergreen sustain + GG Encore pre-launch awareness (GWM March layer).
Free Weekend prep doesn't really start until Q2 — Q1 was scoping only.

quarters.headline: Tracking -8.3% under plan at projected close. Two big holds drive the variance: Mad Ellie SP1 Phase 2 surge ($180K held pending Davide call) and Mafia: TOC $120K creative tranche (held pending June 1 GO/NO-GO). Wonderlands GG Encore slip from June 5 → July 10 also pushes $130K into Q3.

titles.notes: Test of Time free update launched May 19, NA creator campaign in execution. Brand Creative hero cut slip drove some replan cost. Tracking +$70K over plan.

Mad Ellie SP1 sustain Phase 1 landed clean. Phase 2 $180K paid surge HELD pending Davide Jun 5 call (D30 9.8% vs 14% gate). If gate clears post-Patch-1.2, spend re-enters in Whispering Glacier endgame content beat window; if not, full $180K pushes into Q3.
ROAS down 22% WoW on Q2 sustain. $120K next tranche HELD pending Davide June 1 GO/NO-GO on Heaven refresh concepts. If GO, spend lands Jun-Jul; if NO-GO, full $120K re-plans into Q3 refresh window.
Glutton's Gamble Encore slipped June 5 → July 10 on engineering stability blocker. Heaven paid surge re-timed to July — $130K shifts to Q3. GWM March layer credit memo also flowing.
Harbor MSA close still pending — quest config releases Q2 only if Legal closes by Jun 1.
Free Weekend (Aug 8) ramp shifted heavier than planned — CPMStar awareness flight + CreatorIQ shortlist build accelerated. Big chunk lands Jul. Likely needs replan into Q3.
